reviews.review_description:
The boy says to go behind you, I went b
ehind me to the door but it didn't work so bad

developer_response.body: Hey, I'm sorry you are getting stuck on the tutorial. You have to put the paper in the shredder to unlock the door, then turn on the sink in the next room, then find the card and use it for the elevator to finish the tutorial.

reviews.review_description: Too many glitches. You get stuck in the walls.

developer_response.body: Hey, I just pushed out an update that should stop you from getting stuck in the walls! I hope you are able to enjoy the game now! If it didn't work for you can you please email admin@securitycontrolgame.com

reviews.review_description: Every time I get on NOBODY is ever on. If there was people on here this game would be really fun. Me and my girl was on and it was fun but with nobody else ever getting on I feel I waisted few bucks.

developer_response.body: Hey! I'm glad you had fun when you were playing the game. Unfortunately it's just not popular enough to have consistent public lobbies but if you join the discord (linked in game) that is the best way to find other players.

reviews.review_title: Fun just hard to find players

reviews.review_description: Looks like a lot of fun, but it seems there is no teleport option.  The smooth motion makes me sick while playing.
There are lots of fun characters in the game and in online servers you can be a security guard. The game has props you can mess with and the game is scary or funny based on how you see the game...
Dang no reviews dang I’ll change that first review also game is good get now extremely underrated

developer_response.body: Hello, Thank you for the review! I'm very glad you are enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description:
A good game to play solo or multi, coop or versus
Take some money or destroy some important files and avoid being caught by the gardian(s)! And find the blue card to leave the building.
Nice to be able to play it for free !
